steps.title: Use the movement clue
steps.content: Esteban walks to his seat with his head down and without looking at anyone. In this context, straight describes the path and manner of movement: he goes right to the seat without detouring or stopping.

steps.title: Match the physical meaning
steps.content: A means happily, which conflicts with the sad scene. B means honestly, and D means ceremoniously; neither describes movement to a seat. The word needs to mean right away or without deviation. The answer is C.
